title: Cloud Infrastructure Overhaul
description: Redesigned a monolithic legacy architecture into a scalable, highly-available Kubernetes-based microservices ecosystem. Reduced deployment times by 75% and improved system reliability to 99.99%.

title: FinTech Executive Dashboard
description: Engineered a high-density data visualization dashboard for C-suite executives, transforming complex financial data streams into actionable, intuitive insights. Adopted by 3 major investment banks.

title: Algorithmic Trading Engine
description: Developed a low-latency trading engine capable of processing millions of transactions per second. Implemented advanced caching mechanisms and parallel processing.

title: Global Logistics Platform
description: Led cross-functional teams to deliver a comprehensive supply chain management platform. Managed the product lifecycle from ideation to successful global rollout across 12 countries.

title: AI-Powered Threat Detection
description: Built an intelligent security monitoring system leveraging machine learning models to detect and neutralize zero-day vulnerabilities in real-time.
